name: docgen
description: Generate software engineering documentation in Markdown. Uses a structured questionnaire to gather context, drafts to a fixed template, adds Mermaid diagrams where they help, and humanises the prose. First document type supported is Feature Design.

interface.longDescription: Generate software engineering documentation in Markdown. Uses a structured questionnaire to gather context, drafts to a fixed template, adds Mermaid diagrams where they help, and humanises the prose. First document type supported is Feature Design.
